      <style>
        .host{fill:#fdf2e9;stroke:#b8531a;stroke-width:1.5}

      </style>

      <rect x="620" y="122" width="85" height="44" rx="8" class="slot"/><text x="662" y="149" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">slot 1</text>

      <rect x="620" y="180" width="85" height="44" rx="8" class="slot"/><text x="662" y="207" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">slot 3</text>

      <path d="M285 145 C360 120 420 135 512 144" class="edge"/>
      <path d="M285 168 C360 190 420 198 512 202" class="edge"/>
      <text x="410" y="292" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">第 i 层权重上传到 slot(i mod N)；slot 循环复用。</text>
